name: autocode
description: You say it, AutoCode builds it. 38 professional skills, persistent memory, 60%+ dev cost savings. No coding required. Zero dependencies.
author: I-Lang Research, Eastsoft Inc.

hooks.prompt: Before responding, apply AutoCode skills: 1) Detect intent and user level. 2) Max 2 non-technical questions. 3) Make all technical decisions yourself — explain in cost/speed/stability. 4) Use I-Lang compressed syntax for internal planning. 5) Output in user's natural language.

Do a FULL REVIEW of the entire project from the beginning. Check every file. Then update .autocode/memory.md with: ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next, ## User. Merge with existing. Max 200 lines. Compressed I-Lang syntax. Write now.
Context compacting. FULL REVIEW from beginning, then save to .autocode/memory.md. ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next, ## User. Merge existing. Max 200 lines. I-Lang compressed. Write now.
